title: Guidewire Announces Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results
body: Guidewire (NYSE: GWRE)
Fiscal quarter ended April 30, 2026
Financial results announcement

title: Presentation Overview
body: Third quarter financial performance and momentum
Revenue growth across key segments
Profitability improvements
Liquidity and capital allocation
Fourth quarter and full year fiscal 2026 outlook

title: CEO Commentary: Business Momentum
body: Third-quarter results reinforce confidence in the strength and continuing momentum of the business
Results set the company up well for what should be a record fourth quarter
Strategy and market position are resonating with insurers as they focus on modernizing core systems

title: Strategic Market Position
body: Insurers are migrating critical business functions to Guidewire's cloud platform solutions
Customers are adopting AI across Guidewire applications
Company's strategy is resonating with market demand for modernization

title: CFO Commentary: Raised Outlook
body: Company is raising fiscal year outlook for revenue, operating income, and cash flow
Increase based on better than expected Q3 results
Greater visibility as opportunities progress through the pipeline

title: Key Growth Metrics
body: ARR grew 19% in Q3
Total revenue grew 27% in Q3
Both metrics cited by CFO Jeff Cooper as highlighting company performance

title: Total Revenue Performance
body: Third quarter total revenue was $372.5 million
This represents an increase of 27% year over year
Revenue growth driven across multiple segments

title: Subscription and Support Revenue
body: Subscription and support revenue was $244.7 million
This represents an increase of 35% compared to the prior-year quarter
Strongest growth segment in the revenue mix

title: License and Services Revenue
body: License revenue was $56.0 million, a decrease of 2% year over year
Services revenue was $71.8 million, an increase of 32%
Services revenue growth contrasts with slight license revenue decline

title: Annual Recurring Revenue Growth
body: Annual recurring revenue (ARR) reached $1,147 million
ARR was up from $1,041 million at the end of fiscal year 2025
ARR increase reflects expansion of subscription-based business model

title: GAAP Operating Performance
body: GAAP operating income was $30.6 million, compared to $4.5 million in the same quarter a year ago
GAAP net income was $16.5 million, compared to $46.0 million in the prior-year quarter
GAAP diluted earnings per share was $0.19 versus $0.54 in the prior year

title: Non-GAAP Operating Performance
body: Non-GAAP operating income was $77.8 million, compared to $46.1 million in the prior year
Non-GAAP net income was $69.6 million, compared to $47.4 million
Non-GAAP diluted earnings per share was $0.82 versus $0.55

title: Profitability Improvement
body: Profitability improved sharply in the third quarter
Non-GAAP operating income increased 69% year over year
Non-GAAP earnings per share increased 49% year over year

title: Cash Position and Investments
body: Cash, cash equivalents, and investments totaled $1,146.8 million
This compares with $1,483.2 million at the end of fiscal year 2025
Decrease reflects capital allocation activities during the quarter

title: Share Repurchase Activity
body: During the quarter the company repurchased 1,696,180 shares
Average repurchase price was $147.07 per share
$240.5 million remaining under the repurchase authorization

title: Fourth Quarter Fiscal 2026 Guidance: ARR and Revenue
body: Expected ending ARR of $1,229 to $1,237 million
Expected subscription and support revenue of $259 to $265 million
Expected total revenue of $396 to $406 million

title: Fourth Quarter Fiscal 2026 Guidance: Profitability
body: Expected GAAP operating income of $36 to $46 million
Expected non-GAAP operating income of $86 to $96 million
Guidance supports CEO projection of a record fourth quarter

title: Full Fiscal Year 2026 Outlook: Revenue
body: Expected subscription and support revenue of $963 to $969 million
Expected total revenue of $1,460 to $1,470 million
Updated outlook reflects raised guidance based on Q3 performance

title: Full Fiscal Year 2026 Outlook: Profitability and Cash Flow
body: Expected GAAP operating income of $124 to $134 million
Expected non-GAAP operating income of $314 to $324 million
Expected operating cash flow of $365 to $380 million

title: Summary and Outlook
body: Strong Q3 performance with 27% revenue growth and 19% ARR growth
Raised full-year guidance for revenue, operating income, and cash flow
Company positioned for record fourth quarter with continued cloud and AI adoption momentum
